Watch: Engine fuel switches malfunctioned on Air India London-Bengaluru Boeing 787-8 aircraft

An Air India pilot reported an instance of a fuel switch malfunction on a Boeing 787-8 flight from London to Bengaluru after it landed on February 2, 2026, following which the airline says it has grounded the aircraft and is examining the matter.

 Published - February 02, 2026 11:05 pm IST
